focus: Reverse-engineered the WASC operation framework from claude-history (its run process, enforcement hooks, scripts, and 113-step build sequence) and began porting it into this project on the operations-constraint branch; closed this session's context-currency gaps in .context and memory.
current_status: On branch operations-constraint (ahead of main). The active arc PHASE-PORT-OPS (in-progress) is the port of the WASC operation framework into this project, except the bifurcated context (transposed to .context), including memory and CLAUDE.md elements; the pi-context dev arc (TASK-068 in-progress, 44 open gaps) is parked behind it. The WASC operation-system investigation is persisted verbatim under analysis/wasc-operation-system-port-source/ and analysis/wasc-process-record/ and surfaced as research R-0020..R-0024. DEC-0019 (open) chooses a fresh curated-carry-forward substrate for the port (forcing issue-010); the port's feature/task decomposition is deferred to that new substrate per DEC-0019. CLAUDE.md gained the 'Verify, don't narrate' rule; the memory store was restored to 110 files, re-indexed, and gained 4 session-refinement feedback rules; the milestone block was materialized and the stripped task/feature criteria and gap proposed_resolutions were restored from git.
discoveries: The WASC iterate-to-zero loop terminates on two external binary signals — deterministic gate exit 0 AND a separate audit's literal 'Total findings: 0' (DEC-58); the model never self-declares done (research R-0020, build recipe R-0024).
The out-of-scope STOP fires in 0 of 70 full loop runs (it is run-terminating; research R-0021).

A meta operating-regime feature has no faithful L1-L5 layer, and a strategic operating decision has no faithful issue/feature/gap forcing artifact, in the current PM model — modeling friction that itself argues for the fresh substrate (DEC-0019).
decisions_made: DEC-0019: stand up a fresh context substrate for the port via curated carry-forward (non-destructive switch; .context parked).
next_steps: Execute DEC-0019: stand up the new curated substrate, switch the active pointer, then decompose and file the PHASE-PORT-OPS feature and tasks on it.
Run the curation triage: enumerate the live items in .context and carry forward only the verified-good keepers; the rest stay in the parked substrate.

Execute the port itself per the transposition recipe (research R-0024): author the hooks / CLAUDE.md discipline / memory / gate elements directly; run the pi-context install ceremony for the substrate; re-point the deterministic gate to npm run check && npm test.
